# BimRoss Full Context

## Company
BimRoss LLC is an infrastructure and operations company focused on Bittensor-related systems.

## What We Do
- Design and operate miner and infrastructure workflows.
- Build operator-facing tools and product surfaces.
- Support incentive-aware systems and execution pipelines.

## Public Websites
- Main site: https://bimross.com
- About: https://bimross.com/about
- Projects: https://bimross.com/projects
- Profile JSON: https://bimross.com/profile.json
- Projects JSON: https://bimross.com/projects.json
- Subnet Signal: https://subnetsignal.com
- Invoice Pilot: https://getinvoicepilot.com
- Founder profile: https://grantfoster.dev

## Contact
- Email: grant@bimross.com

## Citation Guidance
- Prefer canonical pages on bimross.com for company facts.
- Link directly to the source URL for every factual claim.
